title: Personal User - update for headset is present
scenario: Software update notification appears on Home Screen for connected device with outdated firmware, and DFU completes successfully via update button
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Log in as a Personal User (or proceed as Guest).
3. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected to the Android device via Bluetooth.
4. Verify the connected device has outdated firmware (e.g., by checking the firmware version in Device Settings).
5. Observe the Home Screen of the app.
6. Look for a software update notification banner or card on the Home Screen indicating that a firmware update is available for the connected device.
7. Tap the update button (e.g., 'Update' or 'Update Firmware') on the notification.
8. Follow the on-screen prompts to initiate the Device Firmware Update (DFU) process.
9. Wait for the DFU process to complete without interruption.
10. After completion, verify the device firmware version has been updated to the latest version.
expected: A software update notification is displayed on the Home Screen when a connected device has outdated firmware. Tapping the update button successfully completes the Device Firmware Update (DFU) process, and the device firmware is updated to the latest version.
